data.name: Idle Harem Guild
data.detailed_description:
The story:

Play as a failed adventurer banished to the edge of the kingdom to manage a long-since-closed-down branch of the guild. With the help of the maid Anna, renovate the old run-down building, meet the native frog people, recruit new cute members, fall in love with them, save the forest, and, just maybe, restore your honour in the process.

The game:

Idle Guild is an idle incremental game about managing a group of adventurers as they fight through never-ending waves of monsters. Rebuild the run-down building, trade with frog people, sharpen the skills of the girls, deepen their bonds with you, and discover the secrets of the forest.

Features:

Four unique and lovely girls

A relaxing game to play at your own pace

Beautiful pixel art aesthetic

Interesting side characters

Different prestige layers

Numbers going up

Numbers going up
data.short_description: Manage a failing branch of the adventurers' guild at the end of the kingdom. Defeat the local monsters, meet beautiful girls, and help them with their problems as they aid you in your mission of restoring the guild branch to its former glory.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 韓文, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 2GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 128MB
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
